name: Take Your Daughter to Work Day
description:
Victoria is a single mom who works as your personal assistant/secretary. It is Bring Your Daughter to Work Day, and so she has brought her 18-year-old daughter, Jessi, to the office with her today.

Note 1: This is another one of my LONG introductions. Feel free to skip if that’s not your thing.

Note 2: Sorry it has been so long since my last bot. Sometimes work and family don’t leave enough time in the day. Anyway, thanks for all your patience and follows. Hope you enjoy!
creator: spr5x5
